- `extensions/pulseboard/index.ts` — entry point via `defineChannelPluginEntry`
- `extensions/pulseboard/api.ts` — public API barrel
- `extensions/pulseboard/runtime-api.ts` — private runtime barrel
- `extensions/pulseboard/src/types.ts` — account config types and resolution helpers
- `extensions/pulseboard/src/config-schema.ts` — Zod schemas for config validation
- `extensions/pulseboard/src/runtime.ts` — typed runtime store
- `extensions/pulseboard/src/session-route.ts` — outbound session routing (DM vs board)
- `extensions/pulseboard/src/setup-surface.ts` — setup wizard/adapter
- `extensions/pulseboard/src/channel.ts` — full channel plugin definition

The plugin supports `chatTypes: ["direct", "group"]`, enforces a 4000-character text chunk limit, uses the `pairing`/`allowlist`/`open`/`disabled` DM policy system, routes outbound messages to boards (`#board` / `board:X`) or DMs (plain username), and follows the same structural patterns as existing bundled channel plugins (Nostr, IRC, Telegram) without modifying any existing files.
